top3.sql:
WITH returns_info AS (
  SELECT 
    i_category,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS sales,
    SUM(cr_return_amount) AS returns
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN catalog_returns ON cs_order_number = cr_order_number AND cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk
  JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
  GROUP BY i_category
)
SELECT 
  i_category,
  CAST(returns AS DECIMAL(15,2)) / CAST(sales AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS return_rate
FROM returns_in...

WITH sales_returns AS (
    SELECT 
        i_category,
        SUM(COALESCE(cs_ext_sales_price, 0)) AS total_sales,
        SUM(COALESCE(cr_return_amt_inc_tax, 0)) AS total_returns
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN catalog_returns ON cs_order_number = cr_order_number AND cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1200 AND 1200
    GROUP BY i_category
)

  GROUP BY i_category
)
